steps.title: Use the marketing clue
steps.content: The sentence says a well-executed marketing campaign helped make a novel a bestseller. The missing word should name something that marketing can create and that can help a book's commercial success.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content: Choice A is about being new or original, not marketing attention. Choice C is about being complicated. Choice D is about usefulness. None matches the role of a marketing campaign. The answer is B.
